ValidationRule.description: Cannot edit SAP Customer Number unless you have a specific profile.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, OR(ISCHANGED(RelatedAccount__c), ISCHANGED( Related_Contacts__c)), NOT($Profile.Name = 'PROFILE: Integration'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Application Integration profiles'))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_ACCT_CONTACT_ROLE_001: You cannot edit fields unless you have a specific profile
